detail.description: Kerry Carpenter hits a grand slam (12) to right center field. Kevin McGonigle scores. Colt Keith scores. Spencer Torkelson scores.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a line drive to left fielder Brice Matthews.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a ground ball to shortstop Anthony Volpe.
Kerry Carpenter doubles (4) on a fly ball to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Dillon Dingler scores. Riley Greene scores.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a line drive to center fielder Byron Buxton.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a ground ball to right fielder Austin Martin, deflected by second baseman Luke Keaschall. Zach McKinstry scores. Kevin McGonigle scores. Gleyber Torres to 3rd.
Kerry Carpenter homers (9) on a fly ball to right field. Dillon Dingler scores.
Kerry Carpenter homers (8) on a fly ball to right field. Dillon Dingler scores.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Jarren Duran. Kevin McGonigle to 2nd.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a line drive to right fielder Andrew McCutchen.
Kerry Carpenter homers (5) on a fly ball to right field.
Kerry Carpenter homers (3) on a fly ball to right field. Riley Greene scores.
Kerry Carpenter doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Owen Caissie.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Owen Caissie. Dillon Dingler to 3rd.
Kerry Carpenter homers (2) on a fly ball to center field. Colt Keith scores.
Kerry Carpenter homers (1) on a fly ball to left field. Gleyber Torres scores.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a ground ball to center fielder Victor Scott II. Gleyber Torres to 3rd.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a sharp fly ball to right fielder Jordan Walker.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a fly ball to center fielder Cedric Mullins, deflected by left fielder Chandler Simpson. Kevin McGonigle to 2nd.
Kerry Carpenter doubles (3) on a ground ball to left fielder Ryan Vilade. Dillon Dingler scores.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a line drive to right fielder Victor Mesa Jr.
Kerry Carpenter homers (7) on a fly ball to right center field.
Kerry Carpenter triples (1) on a line drive to right fielder Spencer Steer.
Kerry Carpenter doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Spencer Steer. Gleyber Torres scores. Riley Greene scores. Spencer Torkelson to 3rd.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a line drive to center fielder Dane Myers.
Kerry Carpenter homers (6) on a fly ball to right field. Colt Keith scores.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a ground ball to right fielder Wilyer Abreu. Javier Báez to 3rd.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a ground ball to left fielder Roman Anthony.
Kerry Carpenter homers (4) on a fly ball to right field.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Riley Greene scores.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a ground ball to right fielder Corbin Carroll.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a line drive to right fielder Brandon Nimmo.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Evan Carter.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder José Caballero. Dillon Dingler to 3rd. Kerry Carpenter to 2nd.
Kerry Carpenter hits a ground-rule double (5) on a fly ball to left-center field.
Kerry Carpenter homers (10) on a fly ball to left field.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a ground ball to pitcher Michael Wacha, deflected by second baseman Michael Massey.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a line drive to right fielder Stuart Fairchild. Kerry Carpenter to 2nd. Kerry Carpenter advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by right fielder Stuart Fairchild.

Kerry Carpenter singles on a ground ball to right fielder Matt Wallner. Colt Keith scores. Gleyber Torres to 3rd.
